messages.body: Hello. Hi, am I speaking with Rose? Sorry? Am I speaking with Rose? Yes, this is Rose. Hi Rose, this is Chintan from Zoka.

Hello. Hello. Hi. Is this Rita? Hi. This is Monisha calling from Zoka. You had scheduled a meeting with us? Yes. You had scheduled a meeting for the off-boarding call through the app? Yeah. What about it? Okay. I was wai…

Hello Rita,  As discussed over our call, will be proceeding with the cancellation of your account, and there will be no charges going forward.   Please feel free to reach out to as your in case you need any further assis…

Hello Rose,  Hope you’re doing well!  This is Monisha, Senior account manager at Zoca.  I tried calling you, however, it went to voicemail.   I understand your request to cancel and acknowledge the same. I am personally …

Hello. Bonjour. Bonsoir. This is Rose. Please leave a message and I will get to you. Thank you. Bye-bye. Hello. Hello. At the tone, please record your message. When you've finished recording, you may hang up or press 1 f…
Please sent the style and color you want thanks we’ll see you at 8am
85 Butler dr Richmond Hill
Hello. Bonjour. Bonsoir. This is Rose. Please leave a message and I will get back to you. Thank you. Bye-bye.
Hey Rose ,  I hope you got a chance to check my last msg.  Thanks  Leen -Zoca  Team

Hello Rose, this is a call from Zoca. I wanted to follow up and see if everything is going well on your end. Please do not hesitate to contact us through the Zoca app or by phone if you encounter any issues.

Hey Rose ,   Hope you are doing well !   Apologies for the delay in getting back to you   I’ve noted your request for cancellation, and we’ll make sure it’s processed accordingly   Can you suggest what time we can connec…
Hello. Bonjour. Bonsoir. This is Rose. Please leave a message and I will get back to you. Thank you. Bye-bye.
I hope to talk to you about it. Hello, everyone. I hope everyone saw this simple piece of message, and I hope everyone will be with you. Bye-bye. Bye.
Hello. I want to cancel. I am not joining a call or talking to anyone. Is my subscription canceled yes or no?
Hello, bonjour, bonsoir, this is Rose. Please leave a message and I will get back to you. Thank you.
Bye-bye.
That’s not fair because I called last week. Y’all said you’re gonna give me a call back but none of you call me back. ￼
Hey Rita  Can you let me know what time are you available will call you and help you figure out everything
Hello! So non of you can’t call me to talk about get my money back and close this site?
Hey Rose,  Can we get on a call and I can help you better.

Please call me because I only sigh for month I did not sigh for it to keep going and keep taking money without you guys telling me. Please sent the money back to the card. And close this site. I don’t want it anymore
Sure
Hello?
Hi Rita,  Calling you

Hello. I saw a charge of $200 from my acount. I only sigh for one month last month. I don’t wish to continue.  And I did not want to get charge this month. Can you guys please returned the money. Thank you

Hi Rita, Swaroop Desai from Zoka. Yes, hi. Yeah, I wanted to connect with you about the payment. I wanted to know what is your opinion on the same. The payment was 200. What was charged like? What were you paying before?…
